scripts.dev:https: sh -c 'test -f certificates/localhost-key.pem -a -f certificates/localhost.pem || npm run dev:https:certs; next dev --experimental-https --experimental-https-key certificates/localhost-key.pem --experimental-https-cert certificates/localhost.pem'
scripts.dev:https:certs: mkdir -p certificates && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout certificates/localhost-key.pem -out certificates/localhost.pem -days 365 -subj "/CN=localhost" -addext "subjectAltName=DNS:localhost,IP:127.0.0.1"
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.email:test: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/email/send-test -H "Authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET" -H "Content-Type: application/json"' | jq
